parameters.name: Twiml
parameters.value: =<Response><Say voice="alice" language="en-IN" loop="2">{{$json.voiceMessage}}</Say><Gather numDigits="1" timeout="10" action="https://YOUR_N8N_WEBHOOK/call-response?sosId={{$json.sosRecordId}}&hospital={{$json.currentHospital}}"><Say>Press 1 to confirm ambulance dispatch. Press 2 to repeat message.</Say></Gather><Say>No response received. Moving to next hospital.</Say></Response>

parameters.query:
UPDATE sos_cascade_calls 
SET status = 'completed',
    hospital_answered = '{{$json.attemptedHospital}}',
    hospital_answered_phone = '{{$json.attemptedPhone}}',
    hospitals_called = {{$json.currentHospitalIndex}} + 1,
    call_attempts = COALESCE(call_attempts, '') || '{{$json.attemptedHospital}} (ANSWERED), ',
    completed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{$json.sosRecordId}};

UPDATE sos_cascade_calls 
SET hospitals_called = {{$json.currentHospitalIndex}} + 1,
    call_attempts = COALESCE(call_attempts, '') || '{{$json.attemptedHospital}} (no answer), '
WHERE id = {{$json.sosRecordId}};
